pericopes.title: Philippi khoa Houbung mite dia Paul taona
Keidin hinna kiti chu Christa ahi
Vah tampi banga vannoiya vah ding

chapters.text: Jesu Christa sohteni Paul le Timothy’n, Philippi a um Christa Jesua mithengte jouse hengle aumpiu houvaipo le lhachaho hengatoh;
I-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a konin lungset le lungmon nahenguva umhen.
Nangho kageldoh chanin aimatih chanin kataona jousea,
nangho nabonchauva dingin kipahtah-in kataojin kaPathen kathangvah jingjin ahi.
Ajeh chu amasa nia kipat tuni geiyin Kipana Thupha lama nangho kithopina aum jinge;
hichea hin nangho sunga thilpha bol pana chun Jesu Christa nikho ni geiya abol molso ding dettah-in kagingchai;

chule nangho nabonchauva thudola keiman lung kahitigel hi adihlam ahi; ajeh chu nangho kalung sunga kavop jing nahiuve; hiche jeh a chu keima bulput thudola chule Kipana Thupha lama pana kihonna thusei le phudetna lam thudola, nangho nabonchauva keimatoh lungsetna kachan khompi nahiuve.
Ajeh chu Pathen keima eihettohpia ahi, Christa Jesu hepina damheocha keiman nangho nabonchauva kangaidan chu.
Chule keima hichena ding hin kataoji, nangho ngailutna chu hetna le gelkhen themna adima akhantou cheh akhantou cheh jenga,
chutia chu nanghon thil aphatah chu naphottoh theiyuva, lung kitah-a chule suhkhel beihela Christa nikho ni geiya naum uva;
Pathen loupina le vachoina dinga Jesu Christa a kona umdoh chonphat ga chu nadimsetna dingu kati.
Sopiteho, nanghon hiche thuhi heleu chun kalung ahi, keima chunga thusoh chengse hi Kipana Thupha chalna dingjoh-a hung soh ahi;
kabulput hi praetorian sepai loi chengse lah le midang jouse hengah Christa jala ahi, ti chu akiphongtan ahi;
chule sopite atam jon kabulput amuvin Pakai tahsan dettah-in Pathen thu kicha louhela sei angamui.
Atahbah-in abangin mit thipnale kinelnan Christa chu aseiphong leuvin, chule abangin jong lungngeiyin aseiphong leuvin ahi;
Loikhat chun keima hi Kipana Thupha honna thuseiya kitung kahi hi aheuvin, ngailut neiya abolu ahi;
adangho vang chun kabul put chunga hi bolgentheiya kaumna ding ngaitoa, lungtah pua hilouva chonohna a aseiphongleu ahi.
Achutia itiam? Phatlhem in hihen, thutah-in hijongle, itihen iti jongle Christa chu kiseiphonga ahi. Hiche jeh chun kakipah jobouve; pah jong kipah ding kahi.
Nangho taona le mi phatna homa Jesu Christa Lhagao vanga chu hiche hi huhhinga kaumna hung hiding ahi, ti chu kahei;

chutengle kalung tuple kakinepna dungjuiya hi imacha kajachatna umlou ding ahi; ahinla aimatih chana hakattah-a kaum jingji banga chu tu jonga kati chunga hi thina hihen hinna hileh, Christa chu choisanga um ding ahi.
Ajeh chu keima dingin hin chu Christa ahin chule thi chu hamphatna ahi.
Ahinla tahsa ahin hi keima ding tohga sona ahivangle, lhen dingjoh kahepoi;
ahin akah-a lunggima uma kahi; kipatdoh-a Christa toh umkhom chu kalung ahi; ijeh-inem itile hichu gamchenga phachungnungjo ahi;
ahinla tahsa a um chu nangho dinga khohjo cheh ahi.
Chule hiche ginchat hi kaneiyin kahei, aum ding kahi, nabonchauva kaumpi ding nahiuve, nakhantouna dingule ginchatna a nakipana dingun;
chutia chu nangho henga keima hung kit vanga Christa Jesua nakisonnau chu keima a adimsetna dingin.

Nanun nakhanu nakhosah danu chu Christa Kipana Thupha toh kitoh poupou hen; chuti chun keima hunging hung mu jongleng, ahiloule umhih jeng jongleng, naumchanu lhagao khattah a nadindet jinguva, lung khattah a Kipana Thupha ginchatna lama kisehtena naumu thu chu janange.
Chule nadou teu chu imachan kisuh lung linglau sah hin un; hichu amaho dinga manthahna ahi, ahin nangho ding vangin Pathena kona huhhinga umna ahi, ti chu photchenna ahi.
Nanghon masanga kagalsatje dan chu namusau ahi, tun jong najauve, nanghoa jong chutobangma chu ahi;
ajeh chu Christa a tahsan jenga hilouva, ama dinga hesoh gentheisan thoh dinga jong, nangho lungsetna thilpeh kipea nahitauve.
Hijeh chun Christa a kitilkhouna auma, lungmonsah thei ngailutna auma, Lhagao pankhompina auma, lungnema lungsetna le khoto lainatpina auma ahile,
kakipana hi subukimun, chuti chun lungthim kithakhat, ngailut kithakhat hiuvinlang thukhat kisauvin. lungkhat hiuvin;
moh hamhoithoa kilungdouna a imacha bol louvin, lungnem heochan khat’in adang chu amasanga phajoa gel cheh hiuvin;
nangma a nangma a cheh ding jenga thil ve louvin, adangho ding jong veuvin.
Christa Jesua uma hiche lungput chu nangho sunga jong neiyun;
ama chu Pathen lima uma ahin, Pathen toh kikot tena aum chu kikolchah jing jeng lung angaitopoi;
ahin Ama akisollhan, soh limin aumin, mihem bangin akisemtan ahi;
chule alimso amelput umchan mihema bang bangin aumin, ama akineosah jengin thina geiyin, thingpela thina geisanin, thun anunge.
Hijeh a chu vana, leiya, leinoiya cheng jouse aboncha Jesu mina adilsuhna dinga.
Chule Jesu Christa chu Pakai ahi, ti chu Pa Pathen loupina dinga lei jousen aphondohna dinga,
Pathenin sangtah a achoisanga, chule minjouse sanga min chungnungpen ama apeh ahitai.
Chuti ahi jeh chun, kangaitahte, nanghon sei nangai jing bangu chun keima um pet jenga hilouvin, tu keima umlou pet jong hin, kicha cheh-in chule kithing thingin huhhinga naumna dingu boldoh un;
ajeh chu alung deilam bolna dinga lunggotle natohna dinga nasunguva natonga chu Pathen ahi.
Phunchel louhel le kinel baotam louhelin imajouse bolun;
chutia chu nolna neile suhsetbei Pathen chate nahidoh theiyuva, khang lamvaile vahkoiho lah a nolna beihela naumuva, vannoiya alah uva meivah banga kilang nahina dingun.
hinna thu chu dom sangun; chutia chu moh lhaiya kahilou, moh tohgim jong kahilou chu, Christa nikho nileh kisonna kanei theina dingin.
Ahi, chule nangho tahsan thilpeh chungle, lhacha natohna a hin dondol thilpeh bangin eikisunglha jongle kipah kahi; chule nangho nabonchauva kakipapi nahiuve;
chule chutima chun nangho kipah un, keima jong neikipa piuvin.
Ahin keima Pakai Jesua kakineme, chomkhat joule Timothy nahenguva kahinsol ding ahi, chutia chu nangho umchan kahettoh a keima jong kalung kido-na dingin.
Ajeh chu kakomah lung tahbeh a nangho khankho ding gel dinga ama tobang koima aumpoi.
Ajeh chu amahon Jesu Christa a dingdol gel louvin amahoa ding jengbou ahagelui.
Ahin nanghon Ama chu kipatep’a aphat kiphotchen ahi chu naheuve, hichu chapan apa atohhu banga ama hi keimatoh kithoa chutobanga chu, Kipana Thupha jala soh natong ahi.
Chuti ahi jeh chun ikati akihet phat phat le ama hi hinsol leng tin kakineme;
keima jeng jong chomkhat joule hunginge ti hi Pakaiya katahsan lheh jenge.
Ahivangin kangaichat koma eijenlea pang nangho solchah kasopi, kakithopi, kasepai chanpi Epaphrodi’tus ama hi nahenguva hinsol khoh kasatai;
aman jong nangho nabonchauva mu alunggot lheh jeng ahi; nanghon ama anai ti thu najah-u chu alunghimo lheh jenge.
Chule tahtah-a na a thita vang ahi; ahivangin Pathenin alungsetnai, ama chang jeng hilouvin keima jong eilungset ahi, keima dinga genthei hesoh chunga genthei hesohpi louna dingin.
Hijeh-a chu nanghon ama namu kit’uva nakipa theina dinguva, chule kalung hesoh jong alhomdomna dinga, ama hi kahin solloi jeng ahi.
Hijeh chun kipana kimkeiyin Pakaiyah analem un, chule hitobang mi hi jabol un;
ajeh chu keima neijen lenau lhinglou bangkhai chu subulhit dinga, ama habola kibola Pakai natohna a thideh chet ahi.
Achaina keiyin, kasopiteho, Pakaiyah kipah thanomun. Thu thakhat mama chu hinsut kit ding hi keiman kachimpoi; nangho dingin jong aphachome.
Uichateho lah-a chun chingtheiyun kihong phauvin, achon gilou lah-a chun ching theiyun kihong phauvin, chule kitumsah ho lah-a chun chingtheiyun kihong phauvin;
ajeh iham itile eiho Pathen Lhagaova Pathen hou ihiuvin chule Christa Jesu songa tahsa lama kingai lou, cheptan chu ihiuve;
keima tahsa lama kingai jeng jongleng kingai thei kahi; midang tahsa lama kingai theiya akingaitoa ahile, chuche sanga chu keima kingai thei cheh ding kahi.
Keima niget nia chepkitan Israel chi, Benjamin phunga mi, Hebrew miho lah-a Hebrew chondan thu lama Pharisee kahin;
tomlahna lama Houbung bolselea, chule danthu dola chonphatna a themmona neilou kahi.
Ahivangin phatchomna kanei chengse chu Christa ding lama hakamna a kangaito ahitai.

Ahi, tahmong mongin ka-Pakai Christa Jesu hetna aphat jeh chun abonchan hakamnanbou kagel jing jenge; Ama jala chu imajousea hakamna kathoh ahi, chule Christa chu phatchomna a kanei theina dinga, hichu eh tobanga kagel ahitai.
Ama a chu keima eikimudoh-a danthua kona hidoh keima chonphatna chu neilouva, Christa a tahsan vanga tahsana kona hidoh Pathena kon chonphat joh chu kaneiya;
chutia chu ama le athokitna thilbol theina thahat chu kahet theiya, athohgim naho chu kikoppia kahia, chule ama thitoh kithakhat kahidoh theiya;
ijem tia athia kona thokitna chu kachankhah theina ding kati ahi.
Keiman tua hi kanei ahitai, chule achamkima kahitai kati ahipoi; Christa Jesun keima eimat bangma chu keiman jong hichu kamat theina dinga hadela kadel ahi.
Sopiteho, keiman kamantai tin kakigel hih laiye; ahin thil khat hi kabol e, nung lama um thil chengse chu kasumil in, masang lama um thil chu kadelin ahi;
Jesu Christa a Pathen kouna sang lama hatman sanna dinga abimun chu hadela del kahi.
Chuti ahi jeh chun eiho apilhingsa chengsen hitobang lung chu vop cheh uhite; chule ijem tia lungchom vop naum ule hi jong chu Pathen in nangho chungah phongdoh nante.
Hijongle eihon iphahna chan chengseu hin chonu hite.
Sopiteho, nanghon keima umchan tho-uvin, chule navetkah dinguva um keiho, keiho banga chonho chengse chu veuvin.
Ajeh chu mi tamtah achombeh in achontan ahi; amaho umchan chu najah uva kasei matchetsa ahitai, tujonga kap pumpuma kaseipeh nahiuve, amaho chu Christa thingpel douva ahiuve;
amaho chu akichainau manthah ahi, atumpiu chu amaho Pathen ahi, amaho ajachatnau chu aloupinau ahi; amaho chun leiset thubou agelui.
ijeh-inem itile eiho van gam mite ihiuve; chule chua kona chu huhhinga i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa chu ahung ding kinema ngah jinga ihiuve.
Aman athilbol theina a ijakai athua anunsah thei ahi, hiche dungjuiya chu eiho tahsa manmo hi akhela ama tahsa loupitah lima chu aumsah ding ahi.
Chuti ahi jeh chun, kasopi deitah teho chule kangaitah teho, kakipana le kalukhuh, sahtah teho, hiti hin Pakaiyah umdet jingun.
Keiman Eu-o’dia le Syn’tyche Pakaiya lungkhat hi dingin kajole.

Kanamkoljon putkhom pitah, nangma jong kangeh nahi, nangman hiche numeiho chu anahun; ajeh chu amaho hi Kipana Thupha a keimatoh kithoa tonggim ahiuve, Clement le katoh khompi dang danghon jong chutia chu abolu ahi, amaho min chu hinna lekhabua kisuna um ahi.
Nangho Pakaiyah kipah thanom jingun; ti kitleu vinge, kipah thanom jingun.
Nangho nachonnem u chu mi jouse het hihen. Pakai anaiye.
Imacha lungkhamna nei hihhel un; ahin imalam jousea taona le thumna mangin thangvah toh thon nathum jouseu chu Pathen hetsah un.
Chutengle Pathen lungmonna, hetna jouse khokhel sohkeiya chun, nalungule nalungthimu Christa Jesua ahon ding ahi.
Achaina-in, sopiteho,. thutah chacha, ja umdol chacha, adihlam chacha, atheng chacha, dei um chacha, seiphat chacha, phatna nei ima auma chule pachat channa auma ahile, hitiho dol chu lung gelun.
Nanghon keiya kona nakihiluva najopsau, najahsau, namusau chengse chu bolun, chutile lungmonna Pathen chun naumpi jing jeng dingu ahi.
Hitih chanpi nunga kaphatna ding nangaitonau nahin thahbol kitleuvu hi Pakaiya hapan kakipah lheh jenge; hiche dinga chu nagotsau vang ahinan, ahivangin hiche pet chun agomkom namupouve.
Kalhahsam mana hichu kasei ahipoi, keima chu itobanga iti kaum em, kaum bang banga lunglhaiya umje kakihettan ahi.
Nemcha umje jong kahen, haotah a ninglhinga umje jong kahei; imajouse le thil jousea vatah-a umle keltah-a umje, ninglhinga umje le lhasama umje thuguh chu kakihetdoh ahitai.
Eihatsahpa vanga chu ijakai bol thei kahi.
Ahijeng vangin kagenthei hesohna a neikithopiu hi nabol pha lheh jengui.
Chule nangho Philippi miho, thupha hung lhun tila, keima Macedonia gama kona kapotdoh lai chun, nangho tailou Houbung khatcha jong pehle lah thudola eikithopia aumpoi, ti nanghon nahenauve.
Ajeh chu Thessalonica khoa kaumlai jong chun, kalhahsamna khatvei jeng hilouvin kakhohna nagelun eihunan neithot kitleuvin ahi.
Thilpeh chu kahol ahipoi, aga nangho lama apung ding chu kaholjoh ahi.
Ijakai kaneikime, kahaove; nanghoa kona thilgim namtui doiya kilha a Pathen lah thei dol le lunglhaina chu Epaphroditus khut’a kanamun, hiche chun kaninglhing settan ahi.
Chule ka-Pathenin loupina-in Christa Jesua ahao dungjuiyin nangaichat jouseu pekim nauvinate.
Tun i-Pau le i-Pathenu chu atonsot atonsot geiyin loupi jinghen. Amen.
Christa Jesua um mithengte chengse kasalam anapeuvin. Kaumpi sopite hon salam napeuve.
Mithengten, ahi deh chu Caesar insung mite hon, salam napeuve.
Pakai Jesu Christa milungset chu nangho lhagao toh um khom hen.
